name: Eillon
validation_source: caribbeanwarehouse.co.uk, diveoclock.com - 110ft drug boat sunk June 8 1996, 55ft depth (17m), air pocket in bow for penetration

name: Bajan Queen
validation_source: caribbeanwarehouse.co.uk, diveoclock.com - Former tugboat 'Pelican' then party boat, sunk May 19 2002, 35ft depth (11m), Carlisle Bay Marine Park

name: The Barge
validation_source: wanderlusters.com, sandals.com - Naval Landing Barge, 12ft depth (3.6m), shallowest Carlisle Bay wreck, good for macro photography

name: Maycocks Bay
validation_source: barbados.org, Reefers & Wreckers, DiveAdvisor, DIVEIN - Northernmost west coast reef, finger reef formations with elephant ear sponges, barracuda, rays

name: Whitegates
validation_source: Dive Hightide, Reefers & Wreckers, Active Caribbean Travel, DIVEIN - Barrier reef south of Tropicana, Hawksbill turtles, barracuda

validation_source: barbados.org, Reefers & Wreckers, Wikivoyage, Barbados Blue - Sandy area with coral heads, stingrays, peacock flounders

name: Little Sandy Lane
validation_source: Wikivoyage, DiveAdvisor, Active Caribbean Travel, Maduro Dive - Named after Sandy Lane Hotel, multilevel reef, large schools of tropicals
